title: Church & Dwight (CHD) Up More Than 15% YTD: Will It Stay?
text: Constant brand investments, product innovation, effective pricing actions and successful execution are contributing to Church & Dwight's (CHD) growth.

title: Church & Dwight Webcasts Presentation at the 2023 Barclays Global Consumer Staples Conference
text: EWING, N.J.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE: CHD) will present at the 2023 Barclays Global Consumer Staples Conference on Tuesday, September 5, 2023 at 11:15 a.m. ET. A link to the broadcast will be provided through the Investors section of Church & Dwight's website at http://investor.churchdwight.com/investors/news-events. Church & Dwight Co., Inc. manufactures and markets a wide range of personal care, household and specialty products under the ARM & HAMMER b.

title: Church & Dwight (CHD) Poised on Prudent Buyouts & Innovations
text: Church & Dwight (CHD) has a long history of acquisitions, which are yielding. The company boasts a portfolio of solid brands.

title: 4 Soaps & Cleaning Materials Stocks to Gain as Industry Catches On
text: The soap and cleaning materials industry benefits from revived demand trends, pricing actions, innovation, digital transformation and brand building. Players like UL, CHD, PG and CL look well-poised.
